LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE HAROLD KAHN MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT MR. O'NEIL, CROSS- DEFENDANT IN THIS CASE WHO IS ONE OF THE 3 COACHES IN HIS SON LITTLE LEAGUE. HE DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. CROSS DEFENDANT JAY O'NEIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS REMANDED BACK TO THE ARBITRATOR TO DECIDE WHETHER GROSSMAN WAS MADE TO PROCEED ON THE ALTER EGO THEORY. THE ARBITRATOR TO MAKE A DECISION WITHIN 60 DAYS FROM RECEIPT OF THE ORDER OF THIS COURT. MR. SCHROEDER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF AND CROSS- DEFENDANT HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IS DENIED AS TO THE COSTS ITEMS, BUT GRANTED AS TO ATTORNEY'S FEES WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A PROPERLY NOTICED MOTION SEEKING AN AWARD OF SUCH FEES. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition By X-Deft Jay O'Neil To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. EDWARD C. SCHROEDER OF THE SELMAN & BREITMAN LLP, TEL. NO. 979-0400 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER AND CROSS-DEFENDANT JAY O' NEIL;
ATTY. RICHARD C. STROMBERG, TEL. NO. 453-5400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS/CROSS COMPLAINANTS STEVE GROSSMANN AND GERRI GROSSMANN.

RULING - JUDGE HAROLD KAHN MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT MR. O'NEIL, CROSS- DEFENDANT IN THIS CASE WHO IS ONE OF THE 3 COACHES IN HIS SON LITTLE LEAGUE. HE DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. CROSS DEFENDANT JAY O'NEIL'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS REMANDED BACK TO THE ARBITRATOR TO DECIDE WHETHER GROSSMAN WAS MADE TO PROCEED ON THE ALTER EGO THEORY. THE ARBITRATOR TO MAKE A DECISION WITHIN 60 DAYS FROM RECEIPT OF THE ORDER OF THIS COURT. MR. SCHROEDER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: HAROLD KAHN, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (301/HEK)
